positive: A whimsical, stylized portrait of a ginger cat wearing a tiny astronaut helmet, floating among glowing nebula clouds and minimalist constellations. The art style is vibrant digital illustration, highly detailed, clean lines, cosmic vaporwave aesthetic, deep blues and neon purples.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, messy, noise, jpeg artifacts
